reviews.review_description: The store video doesn't reflect the gameplay. Poor quality content. Very disappointing because I liked the demo. Wasted possibilities. The implementation is buggy, no gane balancing, the demo has more content than the paid game  Please don't make more games!

car driving is terrible. Like when u first get started what is the point . .l like where do you purchase things why can't you build your own crib like what is the reason for this thing it's like i want a total refund
The first schedule one  in vr

I love this game it’s such a fun game and with a small price of $10. I think it’s a great game and it would be an insanely good game with consistent and efficient updates. But if your thinking about buying it’s an amazing game

It’s fun, just not much to do. It probably really fun with friends, but my friends judge this game and don’t get it like all the others. It’s also a little to hard to kill the gang or rob the bank because the people have and over exaggerated amount of health. When I try to turn in the car for some reason it need to turn really far to actually turn.  Overall is kinda fun and I will play again, but I will probably get bored fast.

This game is so much fun!
 you can do multiplayer or single player!

 sell w**d, pick up trash for money, Steal stuff for money!

There's helicopters, guns, cars, tanks, and more 

this game is just amazing!
